title: selago saxatilis
intro: Selago saxatilis, also known as Cape Midge or Blue Kings Mantle, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Selago saxatilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used topically as an infusion or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
